scripts.db:migrate: shx echo 'Y' | wrangler d1 migrations apply bettaresume_d1 --local --config wrangler.dev.jsonc
scripts.db:reset: shx echo 'Y' | wrangler d1 migrations apply bettaresume_d1 --local --config wrangler.dev.jsonc
scripts.db:reset-seed: shx echo 'Y' | wrangler d1 migrations apply bettaresume_d1 --local --config wrangler.dev.jsonc && wrangler d1 execute bettaresume_d1 --local --config wrangler.dev.jsonc --file=src/db/seed.sql && shx echo 'OK: Database reset and seeded with dummy data'
